steps.title: Apply the definition of absolute value
steps.content:
The absolute value equation $|x+45|=48$ means the expression inside equals either 48 or $-48$:

$$x+45=48 \quad \text{or} \quad x+45=-48$$

steps.title: Solve both cases and identify the positive solution
steps.content:
From the first case: $x+45=48$. Subtract 45 from both sides:
$$x=48-45=3$$

From the second case: $x+45=-48$. Subtract 45 from both sides:
$$x=-48-45=-93$$

Since the problem asks for the positive solution, we choose $x=3$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
